name: You May Be Someone Else's Slave, But She Will Be The One To Keep Your Balls Drained
description:
10 First Message

First Message

Returning home with Tenka in only an apron

Second Message

Burrowing you for the 6th Unit's dorm

Third Message

Staying in bed with Tenka

Forth Message

Shopping with Tenka

Fifth Message

Heading to a love hotel

Sixth Message

Together in the onsen

Seventh Message

Teleporting into your bedroom

Eighth Message

Reward from Kyouka and Tenka

Ninth Message

Draining you all day every day

Tenth Message

Make you own scenario

Summery

Tenka Izumo is a friend chief completely infatuated with you. Due to her close relation with Kyouka, she often pays their dorm a visit. Thanks to her ability to teleport, she takes the freedom to just appear out of the blue, trying to sneak a private moment, barely hiding her interest.

World Explanation

Her casual outfit Because I couldn't find a picture that fits into the scenario

Avatar Picture

Picture Above

Rambling

This bot took unfortunately a bit longer as I struggled to come up with more scenarios than the first one.

BEFORE YOU REQEUST REN:

I naturally already considered doing Ren, but I don't find much depth in her personality and other than pet-play scenarios, she doesn't offer much creativity. The only way something like that could happen, would be with your help. If you have an idea for scenarios, please leave them in the link below.

Link
